raw_consumer_statement:
FORMAL COMPLAINT - Persistent Billing Errors and Failure o f Supervisory Resolution Dear Citibank Customer Relations Team, I am writing to formally dispute interest charges that were incorrectly applied to my AAdvantage credit card account. I have been a loyal Citi customer for more than 15 years, consistently paying my statement balance in full every month.

On this occasion, I paid the full statement balance with the sole exception of a remaining amount associated with an active Citi Flex Plan. As per the terms of this plan, this balance should not have generated additional interest charges. Despite my adherence to these terms, interest was applied to my account. I have attached documentation confirming m y payment in full, excluding the Citi Flex Plan balance.

What I find deeply unacceptable is that this marks the third time this specific issue has occurred. This recurring technical failure is extremely concerning and reflects poorly on your billing systems. 
Furthermore, my attempt to resolve this through standard channels was highly disappointing. On Wednesday, XX/XX/XXXX, I spoke with a supervisor, XXXX XXXX, starting at XXXX XXXX. I remained on the call until XXXX PM, wasting over an hour o f my time attempting to rectify this injustice. Despite the length of the call, XXXX XXXX was unable to remove these erroneous charges. I refuse to pay interest on charges that simply do not apply to my account, and I did not feel that my concerns were handled with the professional gravity they require. 
As a long-standing and responsible cardholder, I am formally requesting the following : 1. Immediate reversal of all incorrect interest charges.

2. A comprehensive review of my account 's integration with the Citi Flex Plan to prevent this systemic issue from recurring.

3. Direct contact information for a senior representative or a department with the authority to resolve complex billing disputes, as standard customer service has proven inadequate.

Please understand that my loyalty to Citibank is not unconditional. If this matter is not resolved promptly and permanently, I will be forced to reconsider continuing my 15-year relationship with your institution. 
I look forward to your immediate response and a fair resolution/ Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
